commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=376d721674acdaeefa3babc5068c78991dd84032)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves Telegram update offsets, sticker cache, sent-message cache, thread bindings, and message dispatch dedupe from JSON sidecars to plugin-state SQLite with doctor/startup migration coverage and related tests.

PR surface: Source +1161, Tests +828. Total +1989 across 21 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a refactor PR rather than a reported current-main bug. I verified current main and the latest release still use JSON sidecars, but the PR needs real upgrade/restart proof for the new path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers combine maintainer SDK/compatibility judgment and contributor-provided real upgrade proof; only the rollback TTL issue is a narrow repair.

target.title: refactor(telegram): persist plugin state in sqlite
target.body:
## Summary
- Move remaining Telegram plugin-local state off JSON sidecars and into plugin-state SQLite: update offsets, sticker cache, sent-message cache, thread bindings, and message dispatch dedupe.
- Keep legacy JSON handling in startup/doctor migration plans only; runtime update-offset and thread-binding paths now read/write SQLite state directly instead of maintaining fallback files.
- Extend plugin-state imports so Telegram update-offset migration can replace stale SQLite rows with newer compatible legacy sidecar values before archiving, and detect orphaned Telegram account sidecars from filenames.
- Add startup guard coverage for Telegram update-offset, sticker-cache, and thread-binding sidecars so read-only commands still trigger migration when needed.
- Rebase onto current main and include small typecheck repairs needed by the new base.

## Verification
Behavior addressed: Telegram plugin-local cache/state sidecars migrate to plugin-state SQLite without runtime JSON fallback paths.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/update-offset-store.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/thread-bindings.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/message-dispatch-dedupe.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/send.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/sticker-cache.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/state-migrations.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/message-cache.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/token.test.ts src/cli/program/config-guard.test.ts src/commands/doctor-state-migrations.test.ts
Evidence after fix: 3 Vitest shards passed; CLI config guard 26 tests, doctor migrations 35 tests, Telegram extension 220 tests.
Observed result after fix: legacy Telegram JSON sidecars are represented as migration plans, runtime state uses plugin-state SQLite, and newer compatible update-offset sidecars can replace stale SQLite rows during migration.
What was not tested: no new live Telegram/Crabbox run for the final rebase/typecheck cleanup; earlier PR validation covered real install/migration behavior.

Additional checks:
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/tts/tts-core.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles.store.save.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/models-auth-status.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.turn-watches.test.ts src/channels/plugins/bundled.shape-guard.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-entry-contract.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-package-contract-guardrails.test.ts
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/root.tsbuildinfo
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions.tsbuildinfo
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.json src/agents/auth-profiles/oauth-manager.ts src/gateway/server-methods/models-auth-status.ts src/agents/auth-profiles.store.save.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.turn-watches.test.ts src/channels/plugins/bundled.shape-guard.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-entry-contract.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-package-contract-guardrails.test.ts src/tts/tts-core.test.ts
- git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
- /Users/steipete/Projects/agent-skills/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local
